final_answer:
Phase 1 Confirmation — Build Scope

I’m ready to create the new workspace scope with every design field populated exactly as proposed. Before I proceed, here is the exact plan for Phase 1. Please review and confirm to proceed, or tell me if you’d like changes.

What I’ll create
- Scope: JPMorgan Chase Fortress Communications Hub
- Scope hero image: jp/logo.png
- Welcome message: “Welcome to the Fortress Communications Hub. This space delivers precise, fact-based internal communications across CIB, CCB, CB, and AWM, anchored in risk awareness and regulatory clarity to support informed decision-making at every level.”
- Channel creation policy: channel_creation_by_admins_only = true

Planned values (Phase 1 patch)
- Name: JPMorgan Chase Fortress Communications Hub
- Welcome_message: as above
- channel_creation_by_admins_only: true
- Theme colors
  - primary_color: #003B7A
  - primary_color_contrast: #FFFFFF
  - secondary_color: #117ACA
  - warn_color: #C8102E
  - warn_color_contrast: #FFFFFF
- Highlights
  - number_of_highlights: 4
  - highlights_carousel: true
  - highlights_style: BannerCarousel
- Footer_block_links (3 columns)
  - Column 1: Title: About JPMorgan Chase
    - Links:
      - The Business Principles — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles
      - ESG / Sustainability — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/impact
      - Annual Report — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report
  - Column 2: Title: Offices & Regions
    - Links:
      - Newsroom — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories
      - Investor Relations — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir
      - Careers — https://careers.jpmorgan.com
  - Column 3: Title: Resources
    - Links:
      - Asset Management — https://am.jpmorgan.com
      - Private Bank — https://privatebank.jpmorgan.com
      - Onyx — https://www.jpmorgan.com/onyx
- Navigation_links
  - topBarLinks:
    - Investor Relations — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir
    - Newsroom — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories
    - Careers — https://careers.jpmorgan.com
  - footerLinks:
    - Annual Report — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report
    - ESG / Sustainability — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/impact
    - Investor Relations — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir
    - Newsroom — https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories
  - Social links: (repeat or cross-check as needed)
    - LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/jpmorgan-chase
    - Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/jpmorgan
    - YouTube: https://youtube.com/jpmorgan
- Administrators: (leave null unless you want to specify user IDs)
- image_url (scope hero): jp/logo.png

Next steps after Phase 1 confirmation
- I’ll run create_scope with the exact fields above.
- I will return the new Scope ID and route: /scope/[route].
- Phase 2 will begin immediately to build channels with their FAQs.

Shall I proceed with Phase 1 using the plan above, or would you like to adjust any field (name, colors, links, or hero image) before I write?
